reading.title: Reading: My talents
reading.passage: I can swim and cook very well. I can also speak two languages, English and Vietnamese. I can't drive a car yet, but I can ride a bike. I can sing, but I can't dance.

questions.question: The writer can speak two languages.
The writer can drive a car.

reading.title: Reading: A polite request
reading.passage: Dear Sir, Can I take a day off next week? I have a family event. Can you also help me find someone to cover my work? Thank you.

questions.question: The writer is asking for permission.
questions.explanation: "Can I take a day off...?" là lời xin phép.

questions.question: What does the writer want help with?
questions.explanation: "Can you also help me find someone to cover my work?"
